MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frederc Evenson, Esq., 831.454.8216, for Plaintiff Mateel Environmental Justice Foundation.
Thomas H. Prouty, Esq., 949.622.2720, for Defendant Haier America Trading LLC.

RULING: Matter argued. PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 settlement and for entry of consent judgment as to Haier America Trading LLC is granted- settlement approved. Order signed in open Court. Consent Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

No opposition filed and the settlement complies with Proposition 65. Order and Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
